records.ety: [Prob. from OSw. krake, or ODan. krage the trunk of a tree, the branches of which are not entirely cut off, to which it was likened by the Norwegian mariners.]

defs: A fabulous Scandinavian sea monster, often represented as resembling an island, but sometimes as resembling an immense octopus.
quotes: To believe all that has been said of the sea serpent or kraken, would be credulity; to reject the possibility of their existence, would be presumption.
Like a kraken huge and black.
